overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic game showing a character with large backpack cargo traversing a snowy mountain canyon. The clip features a dramatic time-lapse transition from afternoon daylight through golden hour to dusk and night, with the character running steadily through the narrow rocky passage.

events.description: character transitions from walking to running pace

agents.ego_description: character with large backpack walking then running through the snowy canyon, moving steadily toward the mountain pass ahead

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face with gray stone texture rising on the left side of the canyon
steep rocky mountain wall with patches of snow on the right side
snow-covered ground trail winding through the canyon with footprints visible
rocky mountain peak visible at the end of the canyon passage
large boulders and rock debris scattered along the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks and then begins running through a narrow snowy mountain canyon during bright daylight. Tall rocky cliff walls flank both sides while a snow-covered path leads toward a distant mountain peak ahead.

events.description: lighting shifts to golden hour as sun begins to set ahead, casting warm orange glow on distant peaks
sky transitions to purple and pink hues as dusk approaches, shadows deepen on cliff walls

agents.ego_description: character running steadily through the canyon with heavy backpack cargo, maintaining pace as lighting changes

segments.scene_description: The character continues running as the canyon lighting transforms into golden hour, with warm sunlight illuminating the path ahead. The cliff walls appear closer and more detailed as the character advances, and the sky takes on purple twilight tones toward the end of the segment.

events.description: environment darkens significantly into blue hour, cliff walls become dark silhouettes against dim sky

agents.ego_description: character continues running through the increasingly dark canyon, navigating the snow path as visibility decreases

entered.detail: dark boulders barely visible in the dimming light along the canyon edge

segments.scene_description: The character runs through the canyon as dusk settles into night, with the cliff walls becoming dark silhouettes against a deep blue-purple sky. The snow path remains visible but the environment is now in low light conditions.

events.description: game notification text appears stating 'The sun has begun to set' in the lower left corner

agents.ego_description: character continues moving through the dark canyon at night, with the backpack lights faintly visible

entered.detail: large rock formation visible ahead in the canyon passage

segments.scene_description: The character traverses the final section of canyon in near-darkness, with the night sky visible above and snow reflecting the last ambient light. A game notification about the sun setting appears as the character approaches a rock formation ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow snowy canyon as the environment transforms from bright daylight into a deep nocturnal landscape. It begins with the character walking and then running along a snow-covered path flanked by tall rocky cliffs under a clear, bright sky. As the character advances, the lighting shifts into a warm golden hour that illuminates the detailed cliff walls before the sky gradually transitions into purple twilight tones. The scene then deepens into dusk and night, turning the surrounding cliffs into dark silhouettes against a deep blue-purple sky. Finally, the character traverses the remaining canyon in near-darkness, with the snow reflecting the last ambient light as a notification about the sunset appears.
